content.full_text:
RICHARD D. JONES
Attorney at Law

OLEN POINTE BUILDING
THREE POINTE DRIVE, SUITE 120 • BREA, CALIFORNIA 92621
TELEPHONE (714) 529-9402 • (213) 697-1751 • FAX (714) 529-0538

OF COUNSEL
COSTAS A. LADIKOS
THEODORE ANDERSON
WILLIAM D. MAHONEY

April 22, 1992

FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES
COMMISSION
428 "J" Street, Suite 800
P.O. Box 807
Sacramento, California 95804-0807

Re: City of Westminster/Potential Conflicts of Interest

To Whom It May Concern:

Please be advised that I am the City Attorney for the City of Westminster.

A question has been raised by a Planning Commissioner currently sitting as member and chairman of the Westminster City Planning Commission.

In addition to serving as a Planning Commissioner, this individual has also been appointed by the City Council to serve on a series of advisory committees on behalf of the City of Westminster. These committees include the General Plan Advisory Committee, the Design Standards Committee and the Fiscal Review Committee. In addition, another Planning Commissioner serves on the Bolsa Corridor Specific Plan Steering Committee.

In each case these committees are committees appointed by the City Council, whose opinion is advisory back to the City Council. No decision reached by any of the advisory committees is binding on the City or the City Council.

The Planning Commissioner is concerned that his serving on those committees or any information he receives as a result of serving on those committees may potentially create a conflict of interest with respect to his serving as a Planning Commissioner.

[The image appears to be mostly blank or extremely faded, with no clearly legible text visible. The document shows a light gray/white background with some very faint marks or text that cannot be reliably read or transcribed.]

Fair Political Practices
Commission
April 22, 1992
Page Two

     We are asking the Fair Political Practices Commission to
review this situation and make a determination as to whether or not
he may continue to serve on the various advisory committees
appointed by the City Council while retaining his seat as a
Planning Commissioner to the City.

     If you have any questions, please advise.

                                        Very truly yours,

                                        [signature]
                                        RICHARD D. JONES
                                        City Attorney
                                        City of Westminster

RDJ:la
cc:  Jerry Kenny, City Manager
     Michael Bouvier, Planning Commissioner

fppc.ltr
